findings.issue: Forged zip files could impersonate instances via compromised Downloads folder
findings.recommended_fix: Sign all transfers with instance-specific nonce + hash, verify CEO relay integrity

findings.issue: Missing audit-trail metadata for governance_events logging
findings.recommended_fix: Mandate content-hash + courier-timestamp + signing-instance metadata for all inter-instance transfers

findings.issue: Single point of trust compromise enables full system takeover
findings.recommended_fix: Implement multi-courier rotation + hardware-backed attestation for CEO device
